text: I couldn't sleep worrying about how I've been feeling lately.
label: non-infectious

text: I have a bad productive cough — bringing up yellowish phlegm — and it hurts to breathe deeply. 3 day(s) like this, and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it.
label: influenza/mild

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 3 day(s) in, though I notice it's not improving.
label: influenza/mild

text: I'm struggling badly to breathe — every breath hurts, coughing up thick dark mucus, high fever. 13 day(s) of this, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 3 day(s).
label: influenza/mild

text: I'm struggling badly to breathe — every breath hurts, coughing up thick dark mucus, high fever. 13 day(s) of this, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I know it's likely nothing but I haven't felt right and it's worrying me.
label: common_cold/discharge

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 8 day(s) in. My temperature is really elevated.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Worst flu I've ever had. Bedridden, can't eat, spiking temperatures, every muscle hurts. 11 day(s), and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
label: pneumonia/moderate
